prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 1.8L Rover K-series (K18C4) with a fully built 2.0L stroker kit (Wiseco forged pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, and a custom billet crankshaft) paired with a Toyota 2ZZ-GE head (ported and polished by JE Motorsport) for a high-revving 250+ hp NA build, utilizing a custom intake manifold (ITG Maxogen) and Jenvey throttle bodies (45mm) with a standalone ECU (Motec M150).

Forced Induction: Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (internally wastegated) with a custom top-mount manifold (fabricated by TurboSmart), paired with a 44mm external wastegate (TurboSmart Comp-Gate 44) and a custom intercooler (PWR 500x225x76mm core) mounted in the front clamshell, running 12 psi on E85 with a Bosch 044 fuel pump and ID1000 injectors.

Suspension & Handling: Ohlins TTX40 coilovers (custom valved for Lotus Elise S2 chassis) with spherical bearing top mounts (SuperPro), polybushings (SuperPro) for all suspension arms, and a rear anti-roll bar (Ultra Racing) to reduce body roll. Braking upgraded to AP Racing CP6680 front calipers (4-piston) with 280mm discs and Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with a Wilwood master cylinder and braided stainless steel lines.
estetica: Aero: Custom carbon fiber front splitter (RP Composites) with integrated canards (AeroCatch), paired with a rear diffuser (RP Composites) and a custom GT wing (AeroCatch 1200mm chord, 3D-printed endplates) mounted on a carbon fiber wing stand (custom fabrication).

Body: Full carbon fiber widebody kit (Kahn Design Elise S2-specific) with custom front fenders (extended 20mm per side) and rear quarter panels (extended 30mm per side), finished in a custom matte vinyl wrap (3M 2080 Satin Black) with gloss black accents (3M 1080 Gloss Black).

Interior: Full Alcantara retrim (Sparco Evo II seats with custom Lotus Elise S2-specific mounting brackets), paired with a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (320mm, suede) and a custom roll cage (Custom Cages, T45 steel, bolt-in with harness bar) finished in satin black powder coat. Shift light (AIM MXS Strada) integrated into the A-pillar.
